description: Agent coordination manifest - claims prevent conflicts

agent-12-guard-policy.task: guard policy and rules engine improvements
changes: Added new condition types: COMMAND_BLOCKED, PATH_NOT_IN_ALLOWED_ROOTS, AGENT_ROLE, USER_EQUALS
Added validation for new condition types
Added matchers for new condition types in rules_engine
Updated docstring to list all supported condition types
Added session_start/session_end event logging with log_session_start(), log_session_end()
Added agent_id parameter to log_tool_call() for tracking which agent made the call
Added policy_change audit event type via log_policy_change()
Added ensure_session_start_logged() to auto-capture session start on first tool call
audit_improvements: Session lifecycle now has explicit audit events (session_start, session_end)
Agent attribution now possible via optional agent_id parameter
Policy changes (created, updated, deleted, enabled, disabled) are now auditable

changes: Fixed replay_session to take most-recent-N instead of taking all then truncating (was inefficient for large sessions)
Added _hash_utf8() with lru_cache for repeated sha256 hashing in _result_summary (compression/efficiency)
fidelity_notes: replay_session now correctly slices from end before reversing, avoiding O(n) list slice when limit is set
Cached hash computation reduces CPU overhead for large replay batches with repeated result strings

agent-20-lifecycle.task: lifecycle management improvements - startup/shutdown sequences and graceful degradation

agent-18-self-critique.task: improve self-critique quality and add new critique dimensions
changes: Add error_handling criterion: bare except, empty except, swallowed exceptions
Add imports criterion: wildcard imports, duplicate imports
Add type_coverage criterion: functions with typed args but no return annotation
